name: agentcanary
description: Macro market intelligence — regime, indicators, briefs, narratives, scored predictions

AC_API_KEY.description: Your AgentCanary API key (get one at https://app.agentcanary.ai)

tools.name: get_indicators
tools.description: 50+ market indicators (VIX, F&G, funding rates, ETF flows)

tools.name: get_narratives
tools.description: Narrative momentum scores (AI, energy, defense, crypto)

tools.name: get_news
tools.description: Aggregated market news, filterable by ticker

tools.name: get_signals
tools.description: Trading signals — whale alerts, funding rates, BTC ETF flows, VIX, sector rotation

tools.name: get_defi
tools.description: DeFi intelligence — yields, PE ratios, stablecoin flows, perp funding

tools.name: get_btc_options
tools.description: BTC options — max pain, volatility skew, put/call ratios

tools.name: get_central_banks
tools.description: Central bank balance sheets, gold/BTC reserves, TIC flows

tools.name: get_expectations
tools.description: Market expectations — crowded trades, early-stage narratives, rotation

tools.name: get_macro
tools.description: Macro snapshot — 30+ FRED series, business cycle, global liquidity, US M2

pricing.payment: USDC/USDT on Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, Ethereum
